procs.name: Hammer of the Law
procs.when: Off cooldown - melee crits have a 50% chance (Wreck Formation) to reset its cooldown, so use it whenever it is available

procs.name: Ram
procs.when: Off cooldown - Pulverize has a 20% chance (Guardbreaker) to reset it, so use it as soon as it comes up

Vanguard.st: Energy spender priority: Heavy Blow on cooldown, then Ram on cooldown, and dump remaining Energy into Pulverize; fit in Hammer of the Law when its cooldown is up.
Vanguard.aoe: Heavy Blow and Hammer of the Law already hit enemies in a line; spend Energy on Broad Sweep instead of Pulverize for the extra targets.
Vanguard.summary: ST: Heavy Blow -> Ram -> Pulverize, use Hammer of the Law on cooldown. AoE: Broad Sweep.

maintain.name: Hero's March
maintain.note: 15% haste for 15 sec and makes your auto attacks trigger a Sound of War - keep it up on cooldown

procs.name: Voice of an Angel
procs.when: Use to instantly reset Liberation, Harrowing Melody, and Hero's March

procs.name: Ram
procs.when: After a Ballad (Pulverize/Broad Sweep) - Elegant Combat has a 20% chance to make your next Ram free and increase its crit chance

Inspiration.st: Keep Hero's March up for haste, cast Harrowing Melody to empower your next Ballads, then spend Energy on Pulverize (Ballad) as your filler while weaving Ram.
Inspiration.aoe: Use Broad Sweep (Ballad) as the AoE spender and drop Song of Battle for the ground AoE and end stun.
Inspiration.summary: Keep Hero's March up. ST: Harrowing Melody -> Pulverize (Ballad) + Ram. AoE: Broad Sweep + Song of Battle.

procs.name: Final Verdict
procs.when: Target below 20% health - killing blows reset its cooldown, so spam it in execute range

procs.name: Reprisal
procs.when: When it becomes usable - Centurion Strike (Supremacy) and blocking refresh a charge

Gladiator.st: Energy spender priority: Centurion Strike on cooldown, Final Verdict when the target is below 20% health, Spear Throw for the healing-reduction debuff, and dump remaining Energy into Pulverize.
Gladiator.aoe: Spend Energy on Broad Sweep instead of Pulverize to cleave multiple targets.
Gladiator.summary: ST: Centurion Strike -> Pulverize, Final Verdict below 20% HP. AoE: Broad Sweep.
